metadata.operator_override: v2 combined verdict was AUDITED-eligible (review 43/44 advance:true, audit_clean:true); operator waived the step-2 early exit for a single narrow purpose: integrate the five v2-rendered teaching figures into the body so the PDF deliverable embeds them (the v1 primer-figures contract cannot place image references — skill-design gap reported upstream), plus the v2 review's two one-clause acronym glosses. No other changes.

dependency_order_delta: fig1 placed after §3 teaches the full derive/scan/match/spend flow (and after the §6 forward-pointer it annotates)
fig2 placed at the §6 design-rule paragraph; its ML-KEM/ML-DSA/CLSAG boxes are unpacked by the subsections that follow
fig3 placed at the end of §8's mining-weight-vs-consensus-weight subsection, where 'the wall' is taught — the §§7-8 boundary
fig4 placed at the end of §9.5, after all depicted machinery (factor, fees, demurrage, burn/pool split, emission slice, tilted lottery) is introduced
fig5 placed as a map-before-the-walk at the top of §10, after the framing paragraph
ASIC and TEE glossed at point of use (the v2 review's only remaining priorities)
spec_ref_grounding_delta: No new quantitative or normative material: all five captions restate audit-verified v2 body claims; diff v2->v3 is exactly 5 figure paragraphs + 2 acronym glosses (7 hunks)
technical_accuracy_delta: Caption numbers (ML-KEM-768, ML-DSA-65, 20%/80% split, 4 UTXOs/block, inverse-factor tilt, steps 1-11) are verbatim restatements of body text verified clean by the v2 audit

figures_carried_forward.note: The five PNGs + .mmd sources rendered by the v2 figures phase are copied unchanged into this version's exhibits/ so the body's relative image references (exhibits/*.png) resolve for the PDF render; v2 remains untouched.

rendered.provenance: byte-identical copy of botho-from-the-basics.2/exhibits (verified via cmp during this phase); not re-rendered — mmdc not required

figures.pdf_renderer: pandoc 3.10 (anvil/lib/render.py::render_pandoc_to_pdf, xelatex engine, STIX Two Text, letter, TOC; 21 pages)

verification.implicit_figure_check: all 5 image paragraphs isolated (blank lines both sides, image alone in paragraph) -> all 5 became LaTeX figure floats with rendered captions; 0 inline-not-figure
verification.visual_spot_check: pages 5, 9, 13, 17, 19 rasterized via pdftoppm and inspected: all figures legible, captioned, inside the page box, page numbers unobstructed

notes: v3 body embeds all five figures via pandoc implicit-figure paragraphs (![caption](exhibits/figN-*.png)); this phase's one job was the PDF render + embed verification. The v2 failure mode (pdfimages empty — body had no image refs) is fixed: pdfimages -list shows 5 images.

Same pandoc setup as v2 (xelatex, STIX Two Text, newunicodechar fallback of → / ⇒ to STIX Two Math via include-in-header, since defaults files reject header-includes) PLUS one v3 addition: pandoc 3.10's \pandocbounded caps images at the full \textheight, so the three tall exhibits' captions overflowed into the footer (fig1/fig5 caption over the page number; fig4's 5-line caption clipped at the page edge). Fixed render-side by a \renewcommand of \pandocbounded capping image height at 0.85\textheight in the include-in-header file — body markdown untouched.

Render config archived at scratchpad primer-pandoc-defaults-v3.yaml + primer-header-v3.tex (session-scoped; contents summarized here for reproducibility: pdf-engine xelatex, mainfont STIX Two Text, 11pt, margin=1in, toc-depth 2, title/subtitle metadata, header = newunicodechar arrows + 0.85\textheight pandocbounded cap).

Known cosmetic nit (body-owned, NOT fixed per the never-edit-the-body contract): caption text itself begins with 'Figure N —', so LaTeX's autogenerated label doubles it as 'Figure N: Figure N — ...' in all five captions.
Exhibits carried forward byte-identical from v2 (cmp-verified, all 10 files); diagrams intentionally NOT re-rendered, mmdc not invoked.

Operator re-render (same pandoc defaults + extended header): (a) suppressed LaTeX's autogenerated caption label via caption package labelformat=empty — captions already begin 'Figure N —', so the render showed 'Figure N: Figure N — …' on all five; now single-labeled (pdftotext doubled-caption hits: 0). (b) The re-render surfaced a silently-dropped glyph the original verification set missed: ≠ (§8 heading 'mining weight ≠ consensus weight') is absent from STIX Two Text; added newunicodechar fallbacks for ≠ − ⁴ ⁶ after a full non-ASCII sweep of the body. All 9 special glyphs now verified present in pdftotext output; pandoc warning-free; still 21 pages, 5 embedded images on pp. 5/9/13/17/19; fig4 page re-inspected visually (caption intact, footer clear).
